consent.title: Biometric Data Consent
consent.description: To verify identity and ensure security during shifts, Rakshak Security collects specific biometric data.
consent.listFacial: Facial vectors (processed securely on-device where possible)
consent.rightsDescription: Under the DPDPA, you have the right to withdraw this consent at any time and request erasure of your biometric data.

privacy.bannerText: We use cookies and collect data in compliance with the Digital Personal Data Protection Act (DPDPA).
